tone_examples: Quick check — your repeat-prescription customer count is up 18% this month
Heads up: a generic alternative for {molecule} just got approved — likely 30% lower MRP

digest.title: Chronic disease management programs increase patient adherence by 52%
digest.summary: Pharmacies offering refill reminders and medication counseling see significantly better patient outcomes

digest.title: Seasonal demand shifts: Summer ORS sales up 40%, cold/cough down 60%
digest.summary: Predictable seasonal patterns allow optimized inventory and targeted health campaigns

seasonal_beats.pattern: Summer health demand - ORS, sunscreen, antifungal products surge 40%+
seasonal_beats.opportunity: Stock summer essentials, promote hydration and sun protection

seasonal_beats.pattern: Cold, cough, and flu season - respiratory care products peak
seasonal_beats.opportunity: Highlight immunity boosters, cold/cough remedies, preventive care
